summary: Tesla Inc (TSLA) is the worst-performing stock among the Magnificent Seven, down 25.66% YTD. It has dropped over 30% in the past month and has a high forward P/E ratio of 95.24, signaling bearish momentum and market cap woes.

author: Chandrima Sanyal
headline: JLens Launches TOV ETF, Merging Jewish Advocacy With Market Investing
summary: A new ETF, TOV, allows investors to align financial goals with Jewish values. It excludes unethical industries and backs advocacy principles.

author: Chris Katje
headline: Bitcoin, Magnificent 7 Lose Safe-Haven Status In 2025 As China ETFs, Dow Stocks Outperform
summary: Many of the top-performing stocks and assets in recent years have stumbled at the start of 2025, with Bitcoin (CRYPTO: BTC) dropping to a three-month low.
